answer: 142,411 trials match "cancer" — too large to chart faithfully within the paging budget (20,000 trials). Here is the exact total: 142,411 trials. Narrow the query (e.g. add a phase, status, or year range) to render a distribution.

notes: Match set (142,411) exceeds the 20,000-trial page budget. Per the faithfulness-over-completeness contract, the chart is refused rather than shipping a biased sorted-prefix sample (§B.7).
meta.partial is null: refusing to chart is not truncating (G-39). The exact countTotal is one cheap call and is always exact; it is surfaced in count_basis.trials and this note.
